import type { StructuredPatch } from '../types.js'; /** * Parses a patch into structured data, in the same structure returned by `structuredPatch`. * * @return a JSON object representation of the a patch, suitable for use with the `applyPatch` method. */ export declare function parsePatch(uniDiff: string): StructuredPatch[]; //# sourceMappingURL=parse.d.ts.map
